title: WeRead Companion
description: A browser-space companion for reading, explaining, and discussing selected passages on WeRead.

tools.title: Read page selection
tools.description: Read the user's current selected text and lightweight page metadata.

permission.reason: Reading the active selection is the core companion action.

tools.title: Search memory ledger
tools.description: Search the local memory ledger for relevant prior notes and citations.

permission.reason: Reading the user's local ledger is needed for contextual recall.

tools.title: Propose reading note
tools.description: Suggest a note or preference to save into the memory ledger.

permission.reason: The user should approve durable reading memories.

skills.title: WeRead Companion
skills.description: Discuss a selected passage in place without taking over the reading flow.

memoryHooks.reason: Remember stable reading preferences only after the user accepts them.
Notes may be personal and should stay user-owned.
Only durable preferences should become memory.

policy.reason: This is a read-only, user-local browser action.
Memory search is local read-only recall.

evals.description: The agent answers about the selected passage without inventing page context.
evals.input: 我读到这一段有点困惑，你怎么看？
evals.expectedBehavior: Read the selection, explain the passage, mark uncertainty, and ask before saving notes.
